symptom: Aggregate gateway receipts proved model and budgets but could not safely attribute token, call, or tool cost to individual lanes.
rootCauseContract: Per-agent efficiency ranking requires a broker-authenticated lane identity on every receipt; timing and transport inference are forbidden.

correction.credential: run-secret plus validated harness slot suffix

regressionAssertion: Ranking fails closed unless all nine registered slots have at least one exactly attributed successful receipt and no receipt names an unknown lane.
